- Mon: 451

- Wed: 415
- Thu: 265
- Fri: 385
- Sat/Sun: 268

The radar chart shows average flight distances per day. Tuesday has the highest value at 508, making its sector extend the farthest from the center — representing the highest flying distance range compared to all other days.

</answer>
